title: lasthenia maritima
intro: Lasthenia maritima, also known as seaside ragwort, is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of California and other parts of the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Lasthenia maritima include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health and well-being.
